title: Table formatting within Item Card Updates
excerpt: Tables are not formattable within an item card’s update section. For example, when I want to post an update to an item and paste in a table from excel, the pasted table is rough. All formatting disappears. I would be fin…

posts.author: hgottfredson (Hunter Gottfredson)
posts.cookedHtml: Tables are not formattable within an item card’s update section. For example, when I want to post an update to an item and paste in a table from excel, the pasted table is rough. All formatting disappears. I would be fine if the table formatting disappeared when pasted as long as within Monday.com I have the ability to reformat the table.
